prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Nausea and reduced appetite over the last 1-2 months after starting injections.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Body mass index category: Normal
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 50.4 kg; Height 153.4 cm; BMI 21.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.4%; 9 months ago 10.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 300mg/dL; 9 months ago 303mg/dL; 6 months ago 260mg/dL; 3 months ago 203mg/dL; current 153mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 50.3kg; 9 months ago 50.2kg; 6 months ago 49.2kg; 3 months ago 48.1kg; current 50.4kg), Height (12 months ago 153.4cm; 9 months ago 153.4cm; 6 months ago 153.4cm; 3 months ago 153.4cm; current 153.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 88mmHg; 9 months ago 89mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 38U/L; 6 months ago 38U/L; 3 months ago 41U/L; current 35U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; current 22mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 449mg/g; 9 months ago 693mg/g; 6 months ago 795mg/g; 3 months ago 817mg/g; current 489mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 70mg/dL; 9 months ago 74mg/dL; 6 months ago 68mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 117mg/dL; 9 months ago 121mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 116mg/dL; current 110mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.54 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
